_doc: Single source of truth for which context this repo runs as. Materialised at SETUP --generate. Read by factory-pr-review Phase 0 (coherence audit) and by any future consumer that needs context-aware behaviour. Project owners may extend audit.* keys via ADR — never edit context field.

lock_step_pairs.doc: When a Factory-* skill, rule, instruction, command, or hook is renamed in .claude/, every textual mention in CLAUDE.md, docs/, .claude/instructions/, and .claude/rules/ must be updated in the same diff.
When a public artefact (skill, rule, instruction, command, hook, contract operation) is added or removed, its mention in the corresponding catalog or index doc must move in lock-step.
Every entry under config/governance_versions.json templates.* must point to a file that exists in the repo. Every tracked file change must bump its manifest entry in the same diff.
